---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a workflow, caption styling, timing, or review improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem

What workflow is slow, broken, or impossible today?

## Desired behavior

What should the panel or AE output do?

## Example

Attach a screenshot, reference video, or describe a real editing case.

## Priority

- Must-have for production
- Nice-to-have
- Experimental idea
